title: CodeTune v1.2.0 - UI Modularization & Monolith Refactoring
description: Focused sprint on breaking down the massive activityBar.js (2000+ lines) and activityBar.css (3000+ lines) into smaller, maintainable component modules without breaking VS Code Webview security constraints.

bug_fixes.title: Bug Fixes
bug_fixes.description: Fixes for issues discovered during development

tasks.title: Add Missing Configuration Properties
tasks.description: Add fridaySurahLastReset and fridaySurahState to package.json configuration
features: Registered codeTune.fridaySurahLastReset configuration
Registered codeTune.fridaySurahState configuration
Fixed 'Unable to write to User Settings' errors

tasks.title: Fix new_features.txt Loading (403 Forbidden)
tasks.description: Fix webview unable to load new_features.txt due to 403 Forbidden error
features: Added src/media to localResourceRoots in webview options
Injected newFeaturesUri via window object in HTML
Updated fetch URL to use injected URI

tasks.title: Add Missing Message Handlers
tasks.description: Add receiveHijriDate and updateStatus message handlers in activityBar.js
features: Added receiveHijriDate handler for Hijri date updates
Added updateStatus handler for status message updates
Fixed 'Unknown message type' warnings in console

tasks.title: Remove Duplicate Button from HTML
tasks.description: Remove duplicate 'Excited!' button from What's New modal in HTML
features: Removed duplicate button from modal-actions div
Button is now dynamically created by JavaScript only

tasks.title: Fix Adhkar Counter Increment
tasks.description: Fix adhkar counters not incrementing due to property name mismatch
features: Added hyphenated to camelCase conversion in incrementAdhkarCounter
Fixed rabbi-ghifir to rabbiGhifir conversion
Fixed la-hawla to laHawla conversion

tasks.title: Remove Duplicate Listening Statistics Section
tasks.description: Remove duplicate Quran Listening and Quran Time sections that duplicated Spiritual Progress Tracker Dashboard
features: Removed listening-stats-card div from HTML
Removed statistics.js script tag from HTML
Removed all listening-stats CSS styles
Removed statistics.js reference from activityBarView.ts
Deleted src/ui/components/statistics.js file

tasks.title: Fix Dhikr Counters to Update SpiritualTracker
tasks.description: Fix all dhikr counters (Salawat, Tasbih, Istighfar, Adhkar) to update the SpiritualTracker dashboard
features: Added incrementDhikr message to incrementSalawatCounter()
Added incrementDhikr message to incrementTasbihCounter()
Added incrementDhikr message to incrementIstighfarCounter()
Added incrementDhikr message to incrementAdhkarCounter()
Dashboard now updates in real-time when any dhikr is incremented

tasks.title: Fix Adhkar Counters Not Incrementing
tasks.description: Fix rabbi-ghifir and la-hawla adhkar counters not incrementing due to property name mismatch
features: Added hyphenated to camelCase conversion in incrementAdhkarCounter()
Fixed rabbi-ghifir to rabbiGhifir mapping
Fixed la-hawla to laHawla mapping

tasks.title: Add Card Wrapper CSS for Spiritual Progress Tracker
tasks.description: Add Glassmorphism card wrapper to Spiritual Progress Tracker to match other cards
features: Added .tracker-dashboard-wrapper with glassmorphism effect
Added gradient top bar (purple-blue-pink)
Matches style of Islamic Information and Dhikr cards

tasks.title: Add Smart Islamic Tracking Tooltip
tasks.description: Add informative tooltip explaining Fajr-based day tracking
features: Added ℹ️ info icon next to dashboard title
Added Glassmorphism tooltip with Fajr-based day explanation
Dynamic text: Friday events begin after Maghrib the evening before
Supports RTL layout for Arabic users

tasks.title: Add CSS for Quick Action Buttons
tasks.description: Style Quick Action buttons (Log Quran Time, Track Dhikr, Refresh)
features: Added .action-button with glassmorphism style
Added hover effect with purple accent
Added active state with lift effect

tasks.title: Fix Modal Transparency and Readability
tasks.description: Fix modals being transparent making text unreadable
features: Changed modal background to 98% opaque
Added achievement-full card styles
Added scrollable achievements list (max-height: 400px)
Fixed text readability in all modals

tasks.title: Update Tooltip Text to be Dynamic
tasks.description: Change 'Thursday Maghrib' to 'Maghrib the evening before' for clarity
features: Removed hardcoded 'Thursday' reference
Changed to 'the evening before' for dynamic clarity
Prevents user confusion on different days

css_refactoring.title: CSS Modularization
css_refactoring.description: Moved to v1.4.0 - Split the monolithic activityBar.css into component-specific stylesheets

islamic_date_tracking.title: Islamic Date Tracking System
islamic_date_tracking.description: Implement Islamic date tracking that respects Fajr as the day boundary instead of midnight

tasks.title: Update SpiritualTracker with Islamic Date Logic
tasks.description: Add getHabitTrackingDate() method to determine Islamic day based on Fajr time
features: Added getHabitTrackingDate() - determines Islamic day based on Fajr
Added updateFajrTime() - stores current Fajr time
Added getPreviousDateString() - safe date calculation with timezone handling
Updated all date operations to use Islamic dates
Default Fajr fallback at 4:00 AM if not calculated yet

tasks.title: Sync Fajr Time from ActivityBarView
tasks.description: Update activityBarView.ts to send Fajr time to SpiritualTracker when prayer times are calculated
features: Added tracker.updateFajrTime() call in requestPrayerTimes handler
Converts ISO string to Date object for tracker

tasks.title: Sync Fajr Time from IslamicRemindersManager
tasks.description: Update IslamicRemindersManager to accept SpiritualTracker and sync Fajr time
features: Added SpiritualTracker import
Added spiritualTracker property
Modified constructor to accept optional SpiritualTracker
Added syncFajrTimeWithTracker() method
Calls sync on startup and when calculating prayer times

tasks.title: Update Extension Initialization Order
tasks.description: Change initialization order in extension.ts so SpiritualTracker is created before IslamicRemindersManager
features: Moved SpiritualTracker creation before IslamicRemindersManager
Pass spiritualTracker to IslamicRemindersManager constructor

tasks.title: Add Smart Islamic Tracking Tooltip
tasks.description: Add informative tooltip to Spiritual Progress Tracker header explaining Fajr-based day tracking
features: Added ℹ️ info icon next to dashboard title
Added Glassmorphism tooltip on hover explaining Fajr-based day reset
Explains Friday events start on Thursday Maghrib
Supports RTL layout for Arabic users

js_refactoring.title: JavaScript Modularization
js_refactoring.description: Moved to v1.4.0 - Split the 2000+ line activityBar.js into focused, manageable classes

benefits_expected: Drastically improves code readability and maintainability
Eliminates 'Spaghetti Code' and makes bug fixing much faster
Reduces Git merge conflicts when adding future features
technical_requirements: VS Code Webview URI injection for multiple CSS/JS files inside activityBarView.ts
Proper <script> and <link> tag ordering in activityBar.html
Ensuring global scope (window.*) is managed correctly across multiple JS files
success_criteria: activityBar.css is reduced to under 500 lines (only base variables and layout)
activityBar.js is reduced to under 400 lines (only bootstrapping logic)
The extension runs perfectly with NO '404 File Not Found' errors in the Webview Developer Tools

risks_mitigations.risk: VS Code Webview might block local imports if URIs are not generated and replaced correctly
risks_mitigations.mitigation: Ensure every new component file is passed through webview.asWebviewUri() and injected via .replace() in getHtmlForWebview

risks_mitigations.risk: CSS specificity and overriding issues when splitting files
risks_mitigations.mitigation: Maintain the correct <link> tag order in activityBar.html (base.css first, then component specific CSS)
